format:
(UINT32) Sender bot ID  [rev: 4; awl: 1]
(UINT32) Distribution   [rev: 4; awl: 1]
(STRING) Sender name
(STRING) Command
remarks_html:
Receive command over BotNet.

Distribution:

  • 0x00: Broadcast (all connected users), from a C>S 0x07 BOTNET_COMMAND_TO_ALL
  • 0x01: Database (connected users on this database), from a C>S 0x04 BOTNET_COMMAND_TO_DATABASE
  • 0x02: Directed (only to one target), from a C>S 0x08 BOTNET_COMMAND_TO
